creator: Mark.Martinec@ijs.si
text:
Building port editors/jed under poudriere fails in the "Building package"
phase, expecting but not finding a directory:

  ===>  Building package for jed-0.99.19_4
  pkg-static: lstat(/wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/jed/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/jed/): No such file or directory

Full build log is available at:
  http://www.ijs.si/usr/mark/tmp/jed-0.99.19_4.log

A tail of the build log follows:

[...]
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/jed/work/jed-0.99-19/lib/README /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/jed/work/stage/usr/local/lib/jed/lib
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/jed/work/jed-0.99-19/lib/jed.conf /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/jed/work/stage/usr/local/lib/jed/lib
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: package        >============================
===>  Building package for jed-0.99.19_4
pkg-static: lstat(/wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/jed/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/jed/): No such file or directory
*** [do-package] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/editors/jed.
===>  Cleaning for jed-0.99.19_4


The same port build succeeds under a plain portmanager.
It also did build correctly not that long ago.

Versions: poudriere-3.0.12, jed-0.99.19_4 .

How-To-Repeat: # poudriere bulk -j ... editors/jed
